summary: Tested Quote Builder feature for The Doggy Company. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend Quote Builder modal verified working with product search, service add-ons, discount calculation, and quote sending functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Quote Builder correctly implements local verify_quote_admin function to avoid storing function reference in MongoDB
Discount calculation is accurate: subtotal * (1 - discount_percent/100)
Quote status flow: draft → sent → viewed → accepted → paid → completed
Member notifications created with payment link when quote is sent
Quote Builder UI shows existing quote data when reopening for same party request
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test quotes via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Builder feature fully functional. Backend APIs tested: create, get, update, send, mark-paid, admin/all. Frontend modal tested: product search, add services, discount, quantity controls.

quote_create_api.details: Creates quote with items, calculates discount, links to party request and ticket

quote_get_api.details: Returns quote details, marks as 'viewed' on first access

quote_update_api.details: Updates items, discount, notes. Recalculates totals.

quote_send_api.details: Sets status to 'sent', creates payment link, creates member notification

quote_mark_paid_api.details: Sets status to 'paid', updates payment status, creates confirmation notification

quote_admin_all_api.details: Returns all quotes with stats (total, draft, sent, accepted, paid)

quote_by_party_request_api.details: Returns quotes for specific party request

quote_builder_ui.details: Modal opens from Service Desk for Celebrate/Party tickets. Shows party details, product search, quote items, discount, total.

product_search_in_quote_builder.details: Search returns products (Pick-A-Treat Pup Box, Go Bananas Box, Berry Much Love Box)

add_services_button.details: Adds Pre-Party Grooming (₹1,499) and Pet Photography (₹2,999) based on party request add-ons

member_notification_on_send.details: Notification created with type 'quote_received', includes payment link and total amount

create_quote_button_visibility.details: Button visible for tickets with category='celebrate', source='party_wizard', or ticket_id starting with 'CEL-'

screenshots_taken: party_ticket_detail_197.png - Party ticket detail with Create Quote button
quote_builder_modal_197.png - Quote Builder modal with existing quote
quote_builder_services_197.png - After adding grooming and photography services

database_verification.quotes_collection: Quotes stored with correct structure including items, pricing, member, status
database_verification.member_notifications: Notifications created with type 'quote_received' when quote sent
database_verification.party_requests_status: Updated to 'quote_sent' when quote is sent
